summary: 4 years of experience as a Lojistik Uzmanı. Focused on measurable business outcomes in lojistik / tedarik zinciri / operasyon with hands-on experience in Excel, Power BI, Lean, KPI Reporting.
title: Lojistik Uzmanı

experiences.description: Used KPI Reporting, Power BI, Demand Planning to coordinated deliverables with cross-functional stakeholders. Improved a core KPI by %31 and documented repeatable operating practices for the team.

Coordinated releases with stakeholders and reduced operational risk
